event_evidence: World War II (implied through kendo and Buddhist chapel scenes)

evidence_snippets: Holmes...I'd maybe look for a... Japanese person. With a bloody gun- butt. A right-handed fella, to be
Clinging to a wooden box, with a glass bottom for fish-watching. The girl is Asian. The boy is not.
Highlight was crowning the Strawberry Princess. Always a Japanese girl, sort of an unwitting virgin sacrifice
